# CWE-408 safe — Incorrect Behavior Order: Early Amplification (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-408-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) Raw(sql string, values ...interface{}) *GormDB { return db }

func (db *GormDB) Scan(dest interface{}) error { return nil }

func ExportAllOrders(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	auth := c.Request.Header.Get("Authorization")
	if auth == "" {
		return errors.New("authentication required")
	}
	tenant := c.Request.URL.Query().Get("tenant")
	return db.Raw("SELECT * FROM orders WHERE tenant_id = ?", tenant).Scan(&[]map[string]interface{}{})
}
